info.title: PlatformApi
info.description:
- return HttpOK(HttpCode-200) when process work successfully
- return HttpException(201) when resource created successfully
- return HttpException(204) when resource deleted successfully
- return HttpException(400) when request is invalid (bad request), or other errors
- return HttpException(401) when access_token or api_key is invalid or expired
- return HttpException(403) when permission to access source is denied
- return HttpException(404) when source not found, or not exist
- return HttpException(405) when method not allowed, or not supported
- return HttpException(413) when request payload is too large
- return HttpException(415) when request content type is not supported
- return HttpException(422) when request is invalid (unprocessable entity)
- return HttpException(429) when too many requests in a period of time
- return HttpException(500) when something wrong in internal server
- return HttpException(502) when bad gateway, or gateway timeout
- return HttpException(503) when service unavailable, or maintenance
- return HttpException(504) when gateway timeout, or service timeout

post.description: create api_token based on client_id and secret_key from credentials.
create sdk_token based on app_key and app_secret from credentials.

get.description: get sdk config based on app_key_model (get from sdk_token)

post.description: search device list based on sn_type and sn_list, return device model list

get.description: get device list based on limit and next_page_token, return device model list

post.description: create device based on create model, return device model

get.description: get device by id, return device model

patch.description: update device based on update model by id, return device model

delete.description: delete device by id, return success or raise 404

post.description:
bind device to user based on sn_type and sn, return device model
:note: create device schema if device not exists
unbind device from user based on sn_type and sn, return user model
search file list based on owner_id, start_time, end_time and file_id_list, return file model list

get.description: get file list based on limit and next_page_token, return file model list
get file by id, return file model

patch.description: update file based on update model by id, return file model

delete.description: delete file by id, return success or raise 404

post.description: submit a workflow for execution, the workflow is a list of tasks with their dependencies.

get.description: get a workflow by id, return the workflow model with its tasks and metadata.

parameters.name: workflow_id

schema.description: ID of the workflow to retrieve
schema.title: Workflow Id

parameters.description: ID of the workflow to retrieve
